 .\"     @(#)fstab.5	8.1 (Berkeley) 6/5/93
 .\" $FreeBSD$
 .\"
-.Dd September 10, 2013
+.Dd April 14, 2014
 .Dt FSTAB 5
 .Os
 .Sh NAME
@@ -241,7 +241,7 @@ devices will cause automatic creation of
 The
 .Dq ealgo ,
 .Dq aalgo ,
-.Dq keylength ,
+.Dq keylen ,
 and
 .Dq sectorsize
 options may be passed to control those
